metadata.name: AI Quran Teacher
metadata.summary: AI-assisted Quran learning platform: Mistral-AI tajweed feedback and quizzes, gamification, WebRTC live classes, Stripe subscriptions with an admin premium whitelist. Runnable core is a NestJS API + Socket.IO signaling server; iOS/Android clients are scaffolds.
metadata.status: backend + signaling production-grade and tested; mobile scaffolded

architecture.style: modular monolith API + separate signaling service + native mobile clients
architecture.edge: Caddy reverse proxy with automatic HTTPS
architecture.media: WebRTC peer-to-peer; signaling only brokers SDP/ICE
architecture.persistence: TypeORM; SQLite in dev/test, PostgreSQL in prod

modules.name: config
modules.purpose: typed config + fail-fast env validation (JWT secret length, HS256 pin, issuer/audience)

modules.name: database
modules.purpose: TypeORM root config; sqlite (better-sqlite3) or postgres; entity registry

modules.name: common/mistral
modules.purpose: MistralService: fetch-based chat client, timeout, JSON parse, mockable

modules.name: common/stripe
modules.purpose: StripeService: SDK wrapper, webhook signature verification

modules.name: common/guards
modules.purpose: JwtAuthGuard (global, @Public opt-out), RolesGuard (admin, role read from DB)

modules.name: users
modules.purpose: register/login/me; bcrypt(12); JWT issue; User entity + JwtStrategy

modules.name: quran
modules.purpose: Surah/Ayah entities; offline seed; public read endpoints

modules.name: tajweed
modules.purpose: AI recitation analysis vs reference ayah; sanitised/clamped; history

modules.name: quiz
modules.purpose: AI quiz generation (answers hidden), server-side grading, awards points

modules.name: gamification
modules.purpose: points, UTC-day streaks, badges, leaderboard (lazy profile)

modules.name: billing
modules.purpose: Stripe checkout/portal/webhook; entitlement; admin premium whitelist

business_rules: streak: same UTC day unchanged; yesterday +1; older gap resets to 1
isPremium = active/trialing subscription (not lapsed) OR non-expired whitelist grant
quiz answers length must equal questions length else 400
webhook invalid/missing signature -> 400; unknown event -> 200 ignored; idempotent
AI/model output validated and clamped before persistence

dependencies.name: @nestjs/*
dependencies.why: framework, DI, config, jwt, passport, throttler, swagger, typeorm

dependencies.name: typeorm + better-sqlite3 + pg
dependencies.why: ORM; embedded dev DB; postgres prod driver

dependencies.name: socket.io + jsonwebtoken + pino
dependencies.why: signaling transport, JWT verify, structured logs

coding_conventions: NestJS module-per-feature; DTOs with class-validator; services hold logic, controllers thin
External integrations behind an injectable service (mockable) — no direct SDK calls in features
Secure by default: global JwtAuthGuard; opt out with @Public()
Never trust external/model input: sanitise + clamp + length-limit before persistence
Errors via Nest HttpExceptions; AllExceptionsFilter normalises envelope; internals -> generic 500
unix-seconds integers for cross-DB time fields (bigint) instead of DB-specific datetime

deployment.stack: docker compose: db(postgres16) + backend + signaling + caddy
deployment.tls: Caddy automatic HTTPS when SITE_ADDRESS is a domain; :80 for IP test
deployment.exposure: only Caddy publishes 80/443; app+db internal-only (expose, not ports)
deployment.provisioning: deploy/setup.sh installs Docker + UFW (default-deny, allow 22/80/443, rate-limit SSH)
deployment.firewall_note: Docker bypasses UFW for published ports; also allow 80/443 in Linode Cloud Firewall
deployment.ci_hardening: permissions: contents: read on all workflows

short: real STT + local tajweed heuristics in mobile

known_limitations: DB_SYNCHRONIZE=true (no migrations yet) — fine for test, not prod
Quran seed is only Al-Fatihah + Al-Ikhlas
Mobile apps are scaffolds (no compilable Xcode/Gradle project committed)
Signaling room state in-process (single instance) until Redis adapter added
JWT not revocable (stateless) — no refresh/blacklist yet
technical_debt: Add migrations; add Postgres backups; add observability
Mobile API clients illustrative — align fully to documented routes
Consider restricted Stripe keys + secrets manager for prod
Registration race on duplicate email could surface as 500 under concurrency (currently checked-then-insert)
engineering_decisions: Modular NestJS monolith for the API; separate signaling service (different runtime concerns)
External services (Mistral, Stripe) behind mockable wrappers for testability + single key location
SQLite dev / Postgres prod via one TypeORM config for zero-dependency local runs
Pin JWT HS256 + issuer/audience to defeat algorithm-confusion
Stripe Checkout (hosted) to stay PCI SAQ-A; webhook is the trusted source of truth
Entitlement unifies paid subscription and admin whitelist
Caddy for automatic HTTPS on a single VPS; only edge publishes ports
